---
title: "The Whole Game Pracice"
subtitle: "My First GitHub Push"
author: Jessica Keller
date: 2026-06-24
image: "https://github.com/bhelsel/2026-RLAB-Practical-Exercises/raw/main/images/rlab-placeholder.png"
execute: 
  echo: true
  eval: true
  message: false
  warning: false
---

**Assignment**. Practice for Dr. Julianne Clina's introduction to R presentation. This Quarto document will be used to practice my first GitHub pull request
```{r}
# Hello R-LAB
message("My first GitHub push worked!")
x <- 1:10
mean(x)
```
